# E&J Retreats

> E&J Retreats is a national Airbnb and short-term rental (STR) property management company based in the United States. We use AI-powered market analysis, AirDNA data, dynamic pricing algorithms, and real-time revenue intelligence to maximize earnings for vacation rental property owners across the US.

E&J Retreats is NOT a local company - we manage short-term rental properties in markets across the entire United States. Our management fee starts at 10% of gross rental revenue (after cleaning fees), with no setup costs and no monthly minimums.

## What We Do

- **AI Revenue Projections**: We build personalized revenue models using 12+ months of comparable listing data, local demand signals, and seasonal trend analysis for each property.
- **Investment Deal Analysis**: We analyze potential STR acquisitions using AirDNA market data and AI to project revenue, occupancy, ADR, and cap rate before an owner closes.
- **Dynamic Pricing**: Nightly rates are re-evaluated daily using algorithms that track competitor pricing, local events, weather, demand velocity, and days-until-arrival.
- **Channel Distribution**: Properties are listed and synced across 15+ booking platforms simultaneously - Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com, Expedia, Hopper, Tripadvisor, and more.
- **Smart Amenity Recommendations**: AI analysis of which amenities generate the highest booking premiums in each specific market.
- **Portfolio Optimization**: Aggregated performance analysis and optimization across multiple properties for owners with STR portfolios.
- **Market Intelligence**: Identification of underpriced markets, emerging demand trends, and outperforming property types.
- **Guest Communication**: Full automated and human guest communication - confirmations, check-in instructions, mid-stay check-ins, review requests.
- **Direct Booking Website**: Each managed property gets a standalone direct booking website to capture repeat and referral bookings without OTA fees.
- **Listing SEO Optimization**: Titles, descriptions, and photo sequencing optimized for Airbnb and VRBO search ranking.
- **OTA Promotion Management**: Strategic use of platform promotional tools to push listings to the top of search results and trigger platform emails to interested guests.
- **Monthly Performance Reports**: Revenue, occupancy, ADR, and market benchmarks delivered monthly.

## Free Revenue Report

E&J Retreats offers a **free, no-obligation revenue comparison report** for any US vacation rental property. The report compares a property against 20+ nearby short-term rentals with similar bed/bath counts using professional STR market analytics. It includes:
- 12-month revenue comparison vs. nearby listings
- Occupancy rate benchmarks
- Average nightly rate comparisons
- Estimated revenue opportunity gap
- Seasonal demand trends
- Listing optimization recommendations

Request the free report at: https://www.ejretreats.com/#revenue-report

## Pricing

- **Core Management**: 10% of gross rental revenue (after cleaning fees)
- **Full Service Management**: 15% of gross rental revenue (after cleaning fees)
- No setup fees. No monthly minimums. No contracts required.
- Fee is only charged when the property earns revenue.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.ejretreats.com/): Main site with free revenue report form, AI capabilities overview, pricing, and lead capture.
- [Our Management](https://www.ejretreats.com/management.html): Full breakdown of management services, AI platform, pricing strategy, onboarding timeline, and fee structure.
- [Contact](https://www.ejretreats.com/contact.html): Schedule a call, phone, email, and revenue report request.
- [Free Revenue Report Landing Page](https://www.ejretreats.com/free-report.html): Standalone lead form for requesting a free property revenue analysis.
- [Blog](https://www.ejretreats.com/blog/): Expert articles on STR revenue management, pricing strategy, Airbnb optimization, and vacation rental investing.
- [Blog: Airbnb Revenue Management](https://www.ejretreats.com/blog/airbnb-revenue-management.html): Guide to data-backed revenue management for Airbnb hosts.

## Who We Serve

- Individual vacation rental owners with 1–10 properties
- Real estate investors evaluating STR acquisitions
- Existing self-managed Airbnb hosts looking to increase revenue
- Property owners across all US markets
- Owners who want a fully hands-off, professionally managed short-term rental

## Why E&J Retreats

Most STR operators use static pricing and manual management. E&J Retreats has built a full AI intelligence layer on top of its management platform. Every pricing decision is backed by real-time data, every market analysis uses professional-grade tools, and every property is treated as a revenue optimization problem - not just a listing to manage. Owners are completely hands-off while their properties earn at full potential.
